code:
%%{Infra_LoadBalancer}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_RedisCache] --> Invited: UserInvitedEvent
    Invited --> PendingActivation: UserRegisteredEvent
    [Infra_EtcdCluster] --> PendingActivation: UserRegisteredEvent
    PendingActivation --> Active: UserActivatedEvent
    Active --> Suspended: UserSuspendedEvent
    Suspended --> Active: UserUnsuspendedEvent
    Active --> Deactivated: UserDeactivatedEvent
    Deactivated --> Active: UserReactivatedEvent
    Active --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent
    Suspended --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent
    Deactivated --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent

    %% State styling with classes
    classDef invitedState fill:#7F8C8D,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef pendingState fill:#F39C12,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef activeState fill:#27AE60,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef suspendedState fill:#D35400,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef deactivatedState fill:#7F8C8D,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef archivedState fill:#34495E,stroke:#333,color:white

    class Invited invitedState
    class PendingActivation pendingState
    class Active activeState
    class Suspended suspendedState
    class Deactivated deactivatedState
    class Archived archivedState

    %% Notes
    note right of Invited
        User has been invited but has not registered
    end note

    note right of PendingActivation
        User has registered but not activated their account
    end note

    note right of Active
        User has an active account and can access all features
    end note

    note right of Suspended
        User account has been temporarily suspended
        by an administrator
    end note

    note right of Deactivated
        User has voluntarily deactivated their account
    end note

    note right of Archived
        User account has been archived (Infra_LoadBalancer)
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个用户生命周期状态图，从邀请开始，经过注册激活，最终可能归档。关键是要有清晰的流转路径，而且Suspended和Deactivated都能回到Active，也能最终进入Archived。
明白了。那PendingActivation这个状态的触发条件是什么？是用户注册后还没激活吗？另外，Suspended是管理员操作的暂停，Deactivated是用户自己主动停用，我理解对吗？
对的。PendingActivation就是已注册未激活。Suspended是管理员暂停，Deactivated是自愿停用。两个都能恢复回Active，也都能被归档。还有，Invited状态是由Redis缓存触发的，PendingActivation还关联Etcd集群。

好的，我先画出六个核心状态：Invited、PendingActivation、Active、Suspended、Deactivated、Archived。流转关系我理一下：Invited到PendingActivation是UserRegisteredEvent，PendingActivation到Active是UserActivatedEvent。Suspended和Active之间双向，Deactivated和Active之间也能双向。然后Active、Suspended、Deactivated都能到Archived。
状态颜色要区分明显一点。Invited和Deactivated用灰色系，PendingActivation用橙色提醒待处理，Active用绿色，Suspended用深橙色警示，Archived用深蓝灰色表示终结。另外给每个状态加右侧注释说明具体含义。

颜色方案记下了。Invited灰色、PendingActivation橙色、Active绿色、Suspended深橙、Deactivated灰色、Archived深蓝灰。注释我分别写：Invited是已邀请未注册，PendingActivation是已注册未激活，Active是已激活可访问全部功能，Suspended是管理员临时暂停，Deactivated是用户自愿停用，Archived是已归档——这里我标注一下关联Infra_LoadBalancer。
等等，Infra_RedisCache和Infra_EtcdCluster这两个基础设施节点要放在图里吗？还是只作为事件来源标注？
我作为触发源节点放在左侧，用虚线或特殊标记区分。RedisCache触发Invited，EtcdCluster和RedisCache都关联PendingActivation的注册事件。这样结构清晰，不会和主状态流混淆。图已经完成了，你看一下整体布局。
可以，状态流转完整，颜色区分清楚，基础设施关联也明确了。这个版本没问题。
